page.title: AI Influence Items
page.t: A hand-sealed letter passed to you in person. Its contents are known to you and the author; the seal marks it genuine.
A pocket data chip, encrypted to your personal key. Whatever is on it was given, not taken.
A compiled dossier of names, routes and observations. Someone did this legwork for you.
A witnessed agreement bearing signatures and a faction stamp. Paper still means something out here.
A small object of no market value and considerable meaning. It was given freely.
